calendar.matters:
PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Dec-07-2009 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Continued To Dec-07-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Continued To Nov-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for VickyAnn McAteer.

Ms. Callejo stated that she had spoken with Ms. McAteer, that at the last hearing Ms. McAteer had appeared with lots of documents, that her client was to have a revised schedule to her within one week, that she filed her declaration and then she received an e-mail from her client with revised schedules. In addition, she stated that her client can't put the accounting in the right format, that she will try and put them together for her this week, that she is doing the best she can with a client that doesn't provide her with the information needed, and that she could possibly have the accounting filed by next week. The Court ordered the accounting on file by October 26, 2009 and ordered the matter continued to November 2, 2009. The Court stated if the accounting is not on file by October 26, 2009 then sanctions in the amount fo $25.00 per day will begin to run against the Trustee.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Continued To Oct-05-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Continued To Sep-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for and with Vickyann McAteer.

Ms. Callejo stated that the accounting filed in November was not in proper format, that the Trustee had health issues and that she now had a more detailed account with her today. In addition, Ms. Callejo explained that in home care was provided by the family members, that there was a problem with the invoices for payments made to the family members and that it made more sense to file an amended petition. The matter was continued to September 21, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on filing of the amended accounting petition. The accounting is to be heard on October 19, 2009. Notice is to be given to the bonding company.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Wendy Pun, CSR#12891. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Jun-30-2009 Continued To Aug-10-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for Vickyann McAteer.

Ms. Callejo stated that she didn't have much to report, that notice had not been served as she anticipated having to amend the petition, and that she received the original documents but that she returned them to the Trustee as she was not prepared to do the accounting. Furthermore, Ms. Callejo stated that directed the Trustee on how to do the accounting, that she had not heard from the Family members, that there were no funds in the trust, that she did not get a reply from the Trustee and that Hattie was receiving 24 hour care. The Court reviewed some of the expenses and stated that there were no explanations as to those payments. The matter was continued to August 10, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A Citation will be issued to Trustee Vickyann McAteer ordering her to appear on August 10, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Jun-02-2009 Continued To Jun-30-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Continued To Jun-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for VickyAnn McAteer.

Ms. Callejo stated that she was working with her Client, that she did not receive the schedules and that her Client had some health issues. The matter was continued to June 2, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dpet. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Off Calendar Mar-10-2009 Continued To Mar-24-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
